embedding: TIP4P/2005 water represented as electrostatic point charges within the production 5 Å local-shell construction
solute_condition: h-BN scaffold and pyrene chromophores frozen in x, y, and z during the source MD trajectory
physical_scope: solvent-induced site-energy fluctuations under frozen-solute conditions
hamiltonian_note: Only diagonal site-energy terms are generated. Off-diagonal excitonic couplings J_ij are not included.

centering.site_energy_trajectory_centered.csv: Per-frame common energy removed. This subtracts an identity contribution from each diagonal Hamiltonian.
centering.site_energy_trajectory_global_centered.c: Single global mean over all frames and chromophores removed.
